content: Update backend .env: ADMIN_API_KEY, real OneSignal App ID, render webhook URL flag
Build admin auth dependency (x-admin-key header) + apply to /liquidity/run-now and /auth/xaman/mock-resolve
Build /api/system/readiness endpoint with all production-readiness flags
OneSignal service: graceful fallback when REST key missing; broadcast helper using external_id
Frontend public/: add OneSignalSDKWorker.js + add OneSignal v16 SDK script to index.html
Frontend hook: useOneSignal (initialize, prompt permission, sync subscription to backend)
Frontend: NotificationIndicator (Enabled/Disabled badge + Enable Alerts button)
Frontend pages: /terms and /privacy + Footer with links
Wire useOneSignal into Dashboard (auto-prompt after login) + add NotificationIndicator to TopNav
